name: Pad Thai Vmxv03a
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Tamarind juice (Lemon or lime may be substituted)
2 tbsp Dried, unsalted turnip, cut into small pieces
1/4 cup Chives, cut in 1 inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak noodles in cold water for 2 hours until soft. Drain and set aside.
2. Heat a large skillet until hot, then add oil.
3. Add the garlic and dried shrimp to the skillet and stir-fry.
4. Add the noodles to the skillet and stir-fry until translucent. Reduce heat if the mixture is cooking too quickly and the noodles stick.
5. Add fish sauce, sugar, tamarind juice, and paprika. Stir-fry mixture until combined.
6. Stir in the tofu, turnip, and egg. Turn the heat to high and cook until the egg sets, stirring gently.
7. Thoroughly combine the mixture and continue cooking over medium-high heat for about 2 minutes until most of the liquid is reduced.
8. Mix in the chives, peanuts, and bean sprouts.
9. Place on a serving dish, arrange the garnishes attractively, and serve. Makes four servings.
Note: To make fried tofu, chop tofu into 1/2 inch squares and fry on both sides until golden brown.
